GREECE_CAMERA_POTENTIAL_TARGET:
Potential target located
Hold ^3[{+attack}]^7 to Scan
GREECE_DRONE_ALERT_FAIL: The KVA have been alerted to your presence.
GREECE_DRONE_BURKEKILLED_FAIL: You allowed Gideon to be killed.
GREECE_DRONE_INVALIDTARGET_FAIL: Shoot only designated targets to avoid alerting the KVA.
GREECE_DRONE_KILLHADES_FAIL: You killed Hades before getting the necessary intel.
GREECE_DRONE_NOKILLHADES_FAIL: You took too long to kill Hades.
GREECE_DRONE_TIMEREXPIRE_FAIL: You must kill all enemies before the mute charge runs out.
GREECE_FAIL_ENDING_LATE_TRIGGER: You let the convoy pass without triggering the explosive.
GREECE_FAIL_ENDING_PLACE_EXPLOSIVE: You must place the explosive before time runs out.
GREECE_FAIL_SCRAMBLE_SUPPRESS_SNIPER: Keep the sniper suppressed to avoid taking heavy damage.
GREECE_HINT_ATRIUM: Move the WASP to see into the atrium
GREECE_HINT_CAR_ALARM: Distract the guards by triggering a car alarm
GREECE_HINT_COURTYARD_OVERWATCH: Eliminate the 2 guards watching over the courtyard
GREECE_HINT_DRONE2_USE: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to control a KVA drone
GREECE_HINT_DRONE_SHOOT: Press ^3[{+breath_sprint}]^7 to Stabilize, press ^3[{+attack}]^7 to Fire Weapon
GREECE_HINT_ENDING_OPEN_DOOR: Press and hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Open Door
GREECE_HINT_HADES_ZOOM: Zoom in on Hades from the front of the building
GREECE_HINT_LOOK_AT_TRUCK: Eliminate the guards near the truck
GREECE_HINT_MUTE_BREACH: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Signal the Mute Breach
GREECE_HINT_SCRAMBLE_SUPPRESS: Suppress the sniper so that Ilona can advance
GREECE_HINT_SUPPORT_ALLIES: Provide Sniper Support for your Allies
GREECE_MARKET_TARGETESCAPE1_FAIL: You let the KVA Key-Man get away.
GREECE_MARKET_TARGETESCAPE3_FAIL: You must kill the Key-Man before the KVA become alerted.
GREECE_OBJ_DRONE: Provide Sniper Support with the WASP.
GREECE_OBJ_MARKET_FOLLOW: Follow and ambush the KVA Key-Man.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_GDN_CUTTHROUGHCOPS: ^2Gideon: ^7Ilona, Hades is cutting through cops left and right!  His truck is heavily armored!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_GDN_DONOTLETUPPLEASE: ^2Gideon: ^7Bravo, do not let up!  Get Hades at any cost!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_BRAVOMOVEYOGOX: ^2Ilona: ^7Copy that, Bravo is moving to the X.  Let's go!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_CLEAROUTPLEASE: ^2Ilona: ^7Get out of here!  Clear out!  Now!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_CLEAROUTSNIPERPI: ^2Ilona: ^7A Stinger missile will clear out that sniper!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_DRONESDOWNYALL: ^2Ilona: ^7Drones are down.  Keep pushing toward that sniper!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_EYESONSANCHEZ: ^2Ilona: ^7Prophet, have eyes on Torres!  He's been hit!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_EYESONVEHICLEALM: ^2Ilona: ^7Got eyes on Hades' truck!  We're almost there!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_GETDOWNSTAYDOWN: ^2Ilona: ^7Get down!  Stay away from the windows!  Everyone stay away from the windows!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_GONNAOPENORWHAT: ^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell, open the door!  KVA reinforcements are on their way!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_GOODNOWWEJUST: ^2Ilona: ^7Now--look for the KVA comm signal.  That'll be our ticket inside the Safehouse.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_HADESISGETTINGOO: ^2Ilona: ^7God damnit, Mitchell!  Hades is getting away!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_HESNOTHERE: ^2Ilona: ^7He's not here.  Switch to another camera.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_ILLKEEPHIMPINNED: ^2Ilona: ^7I'll keep him pinned down!  Go, Mitchell!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_JUMPDOWNBEOTCH: ^2Ilona: ^7Hades is almost here!  Jump down so we can set the ambush!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_KEYMANSLIPPED: ^2Ilona: ^7Damnit!  Prophet, we lost the signal. Key-Man slipped by.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_KVACELLPHONES: ^2Ilona: ^7Let's find the Key-Man.  Scan for comm signals.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_LASTDRONELIGHTUP: ^2Ilona: ^7That's the last drone!  Light that sniper up!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_MAKEITQUICK: ^2Ilona: ^7We'll tail him, get inside and neutralize any KVA we find.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_MAKESURESTREETS: ^2Ilona: ^7Make sure the streets are clear!  Do not approach Hades before the streets are clear!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_MOVEWELLCUT: ^2Ilona: ^7Move!  We'll cut across the rooftops and head off the convoy!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_NEGATIVEM: ^2Ilona: ^7No.  Signal is close to a match, but not KVA.  Keep looking.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_NEVERHITHIM: ^2Ilona: ^7You'll never hit him with that!  We need the stinger!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_OUTOFTIMEPLEASE: ^2Ilona: ^7We're running out of time!  Set the explosives!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_PUSHFOWARDCONTAI: ^2Ilona: ^7Push forward!  We need to contain the scene!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_SETUPAMBUSHTHERE: ^2Ilona: ^7There!  We can set up an ambush from down there!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_SHITRIGHTKILL: ^2Ilona: ^7Shit! We need that stinger.  Let's move!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_SHITTHATSALOTOGR: ^2Ilona: ^7Shit, that's a lot of open ground.  You want to run first, or suppress fire?
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_SNIPERCANTHIT: ^2Ilona: ^7Come on, the sniper can't hit us on the street below.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_SNIPERTOP: ^2Ilona: ^7Damn!  Sniper's got a bead on us!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_STAYONMESANCHEZ: ^2Ilona: ^7Stay on me, Mitchell!  Torres is just ahead!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_STREETSARECLEARP: ^2Ilona: ^7Clear!  Streets are clear!  Prophet, we are moving on Hades!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_TRUCKOUTTAWAY: ^2Ilona: ^7Let's get this truck out of the way!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_WASTINGTIMEWHATS: ^2Ilona: ^7We're wasting time!  What's it going to be?
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_WELOSTEYESONKEY: ^2Ilona: ^7All stations, we lost the Key-Man!  Repeat, Key-Man got away.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_WENEEDTOBESTUNG: ^2Ilona: ^7We need that stinger!  I'll cover you!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_WHATCOVERMEYO: ^2Ilona: ^7What are you waiting for?  Cover me!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_ILN_YOULHAVETODO: ^2Ilona: ^7You'll have to zoom in for a proper scan.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_IRS_TEAMIDONTNEEDTO: ^2Irons: ^7Team, I don't need to remind you how important this mission is. Hades is responsible for the nuclear attacks four years ago.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_IRS_WEBRINGHIMDOWNWE: ^2Irons: ^7We bring him down, we bring down the whole KVA network. There's no room for error. Get it done.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_PRP_CONVOYISFOURX: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo, Hades' convoy is four mikes to the X.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_PRP_GOODHUNTING: ^2Prophet: ^7Roger that!  Be advised, More KVA inbound!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_PRP_KEYMANHASLEFTARE: ^2Prophet: ^7All stations be advised, Key-Man has left the area.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_PRP_LOCALPOLICE: ^2Prophet: ^7All stations, be advised, local police have joined the chase.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_PRP_TWOMIKESOUT: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo, Hades convoy is two mikes out.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_SCZ_ATLASWEARE: ^2Torres: ^7Atlas, we are creating a barricade near the windmill on 18th and--
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRE_SCZ_OFFICERSDOWN: ^2Torres: ^7Man down!  Man down!  Sniper in the windmill!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_GDN_ABODYDOUBLE: ^2Gideon: ^7A body double was rigged with a remote bomb!  We have a man down!  Repeat--man down!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_GDN_ALPHAHASEYES: ^2Gideon: ^7Copy that.   Hades just entered the conference center.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_GDN_PLACINGMUTE: ^2Gideon: ^7Alpha in position.  Placing  the Mute Charge.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_GDN_SCANNINGRETINA: ^2Gideon: ^7Scanning retina.  Negative.  It's not Hades!  Not Hades!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_GDN_SORRYTOINTERRUPT: ^2Gideon: ^7Lean forward, Ilona. Supposed to be on your honeymoon.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_GDN_THISISNT14: ^2Gideon: ^7This isn't 14th?  We have a delivery on 14th.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_GDN_WECANTJUSTSIT: ^2Gideon: ^7We can't just sit on this building, Ilona!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_GDN_YESMAAM: ^2Gideon: ^7Nothing is textbook when it comes to Hades and the KVA.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_HDS_HEFINDSNO: ^2Hades: ^7He finds no strength in our cause.  He listens only to money!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_HDS_ITHADBETTER: ^2Hades: ^7It had better, or you will answer directly to me.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_HDS_WEHAVECOME: ^2Hades: ^7We have come too far to have some doctor jeopardize years of planning!  Years of sacrifice!  My brothers, our patience is to finally be rewarded.  We stand together today, at the gates of victory.  I promise you this technology will be the key to shatteri
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_HDS_WEHAVESECURED: ^2Hades: ^7We have secured an estate in Bangkok.  You will deliver the shipment there for final testing.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_HDS_WHATDOYOUKNOW: ^2Hades: ^7And keep it close to me at all times.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_HDS_YOUWILLDOTHIS: ^2Hades: ^7You will do this!  As we argue and debate, this doctor whispers secrets to the enemy!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_ALPHATAKEOUT: ^2Ilona: ^7WASP, hit the three headed for the car.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_ALPHATON: ^2Ilona: ^7Alpha, we're hitting a ton of interference!  What's your status?
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_ANDWHATDOESTHAT: ^2Ilona: ^7Keep your eyes on Hades, not me.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_AUTOTRANSLATION: ^2Ilona: ^7Prophet--Auto translation online and recording.  Once Hades reveals the location and timeframe, Wasp will take him.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_CANTGETABEAD: ^2Ilona: ^7Can't get a bead on that sniper!  We're gonna have to get closer to the tower!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_CANYOUATLEAST: ^2Ilona: ^7Can you at least point me in the right direction?
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_COMEONWELL: ^2Ilona: ^7Come on!  We'll use the back alleys to cut him off!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_COPYTHATALPHA: ^2Ilona: ^7Copy that, Alpha.  Mitchell, swing around and cover the glass side of the Atrium.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_DOWNTHESTAIRS: ^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell!  Down the stairs into the back street!  We need to cut off Hades!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_DROPEMALPH: ^2Ilona: ^7Need to pull KVA off that door.  Drop 'em if you can, or distract them with a car alarm.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_DROPTHEGUARD: ^2Ilona: ^7Drop the guard before he alerts the others!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_DROPTHEMALL: ^2Ilona: ^7Top of the stairs.  Drop them both at once, Mitchell.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_FINDHIM: ^2Ilona: ^7Find him, or this whole mission is blown.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_GETEYESONHADES: ^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell, move the WASP and get eyes on Hades' meeting.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_GETMOVINGHADES: ^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell, get moving!  Hades' meeting starts in less than an hour!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_GETONITMITCHELL: ^2Ilona: ^7Get on it, Mitchell!  I'm still tracing the source!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_GOBLACKUNTIL: ^2Ilona: ^7Alpha, go black.  WASP will start the party.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_GOTASTAMP: ^2Ilona: ^7Got a stamp on the detonator's frequency.  Standby while I trace the source!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_HADESISDOWN: ^2Ilona: ^7Hades is down!  Alpha move in and confirm the kill!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_HAVENTLOSTAFISH: ^2Ilona: ^7Phase 1 is textbook.  We follow the mark, take his keycard, clear out the Safehouse.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_HOLDFIREUNTIL: ^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell, get eyes on that meeting.  Line up Hades nice and clean.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_IFYOUVEGOTACLEAR: ^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell, drop two.  Alpha will mop up.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_IJUSTCONFIRMEDHA: ^2Ilona: ^7I.D. is confirmed--Hades is EKIA.  I send again--Hades is EKIA.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_IMLOOKINGFOR: ^2Ilona: ^7I'm looking for the market.  I guess I got lost.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_IVELOSTVISUAL: ^2Ilona: ^7I've lost visual!  Gideon!  Gideon, if you can hear me, follow Hades!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_JUMPTHEGUN: ^2Ilona: ^7Dammit, you jumped the gun!  Alpha, go!  Go!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_MITCHELLMOVETHE: ^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell, move the WASP to the glass side of the building.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_MITCHELLWAITUNTI: ^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell!  Wait until we have the intel!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_MITCHWHENYOURREA: ^2Ilona: ^7Alpha, hold for WASP.  Mitchell, when you're ready.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_MUTECHARGEEXPIRE: ^2Ilona: ^7Mute charge expired!  Damnit!  KVA know we're here!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_NEXTIMEWAITIDIOT: ^2Ilona: ^7Dammit. Next time give us a signal, Mitchell.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_NOWTAKETHEONE: ^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell, get ready to lay some cover fire.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_ONEOFTHEGUARD: ^2Ilona: ^7One of the guards is alerted!  Kill him, Mitchell!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_OUTOFTHEWAY: ^2Ilona: ^7Out of the way!  Get inside and stay there!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_PROPHETKEEPEYES: ^2Ilona: ^7Prophet maintain eyes on.  Call the ball if it bounces.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_PROPHETPLEASECLA: ^2Ilona: ^7Roger that, Prophet.  Step it up, Alpha.  Don't want to miss the big pitch.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_PROPHETSAFEHOUSE: ^2Ilona: ^7Prophet, Safehouse is clear.  Will put eyes on the Conference Center.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_PUTONYOUREXOSUIT: ^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell, put on your exosuit.  I'll assemble the WASP.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_REMEMBERNOONE: ^2Ilona: ^7Remember, no one should see your kill.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_REMEMBERTHECHARG: ^2Ilona: ^7Charge only gives limited coverage.  Clear 'em out fast.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_SHOOTBACKTOFRONT: ^2Ilona: ^7Shoot from the back to the front.  That way no one sees.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_SHOOTHEEYES: ^2Ilona: ^7Two guards watching over the courtyard, Mitchell.  Take 'em.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_SHOOTINTHEBACK: ^2Ilona: ^7Pick off the stragglers, then work your way forward.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_SHOOTTHOSEIN: ^2Ilona: ^7Take out the stragglers toward the back first.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_TAKEEMOUT: ^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell, I'll call your targets.  Shoot the two on the overwatch.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_TAKETHEDRONEEARS: ^2Ilona: ^7Take the drone, Mitchell.  I'll put ears on Hades' meeting.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_THATSITWASP: ^2Ilona: ^7That's it.  WASP, take the shot, take the shot!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_THEREALHADES: ^2Ilona: ^7The real Hades is close, Gideon!  We can't lose him!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_THEREGOTAVISUAL: ^2Ilona: ^7There.  Have eyes on Hades.  Wish we could pop him right now.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_THESOURCETRUCK: ^2Ilona: ^7That's Hades!  All stations move to intercept!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_TWOONFTHEROOF: ^2Ilona: ^7Shoot two at the top of the stairs.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_WENEEDTOPULL: ^2Ilona: ^7Need to pull KVA off that door so Alpha can move in.  Trip a car alarm.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_WERECRAWLINGWITH: ^2Gideon: ^7We're crawling with KVA!  Keep pushing forward and try to cut off Hades!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_YOUHAVEANOTHER: ^2Ilona: ^7Alpha hold, you have a watcher inside.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_YOULLNEEDTONEUT: ^2Ilona: ^7Wait for the guards to get close, then drop 'em.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_YOUNEARLYBLEW: ^2Ilona: ^7You nearly blew the timer on that.  Gotta be quicker.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_YOUNEEDTOBEFASTE: ^2Ilona: ^7You need to be faster than that.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_YOURDATEIS: ^2Gideon: ^7Switching eyes to Bravo.  Mitchell--you"wife" is waiting.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_ILN_YOUREXOSISFIT: ^2Ilona: ^7Your exo is fitted with the urban kit.   We find trouble in a crowd?  Don't hesitate to deploy your sonics.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_ALLSTATIONSWILL: ^2KVA Soldier: ^7All stations will be secure on time, sir.  Your meeting will go uninterrupted.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_DAMINPROPDISENGA: ^2Ilona: ^7Damnit!  Prophet, Mitchell has disengaged!  Hades got away!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_DIMITRIISTHAT: ^2KVA Soldier: ^7Dimitri!  Is that vehicle gone yet?
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_IDONTCARE: ^2KVA Soldier: ^7I don't care!  Remove your vehicle from this street or we will do it for you.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_MAKESURETHE: ^2KVA Soldier One: ^7I've made sure the snipers are in position.  They'll check in every quarter hour.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_NOSTAYWHEREYOU: ^2KVA Soldier: ^7No.  Stay where you are, I'm calling this in.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_SOMETHINGSNOTRIG: ^2KVA Soldier: ^7Something's not right - I'm calling it in.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_THATPOSES: ^2KVA Captain: ^7That poses great risk.  We don't know if the shipment is stable enough to--
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_THEREISABLIND: ^2KVA Soldier Two: ^7There is a blind spot in this alley from that vantage point.  Have a man stationed on that corner to cover it.  As for the perimeter, we've got patrols stationed on each level and the parking lot, here and here.   As soon as the meeting is over, an armore
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_THISDOCTORWILL: ^2KVA Captain: ^7This doctor will tell them nothing.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_THISISPRIVATE: ^2KVA Soldier: ^7This is private property.  You need to leave.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_KVA_THISSTREETISOFF: ^2KVA Soldier: ^7This street is off limits.  Get moving.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_ABORTTHEMISSION: ^2Prophet: ^7All stations abort! Guards have been alerted! Repeat, Abort!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_ALLSTATIONSABORT: ^2Prophet: ^7All stations abort!  Bravo has been compromised.  Repeat, Bravo has been compromised.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_ALLSTATIONSBEADV: ^2Prophet: ^7All stations be advised, it looks as though Hades is starting the meeting.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_ALLSTATSCONVOYSO: ^2Prophet: ^7All stations, be advised, Hades Convoy is southbound!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_ALLTEAMSBEADVISE: ^2Prophet: ^7All teams, be advised that Bravo is holding.  There may be a problem.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_ALLTEAMSONHADES: ^2Prophet: ^7All teams on Hades!   All teams on Hades!  Truck is southbound!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_ALLTEAMSVEHICLE: ^2Prophet: ^7All teams -- truck leaving south garage.  Its Hades!  Hades is on the move!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_ALPHANEEDSAWASP: ^2Prophet: ^7Alpha needs a WASP hit.  Shoot to kill.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BEADVISEDKVAHAS: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo, be advised, KVA has surrounded your position.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOBEADVISED: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo, be advised, the clock is ticking.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOBEADVISEDTH: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo, be advised, the window is closing.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOBEADVISEDYO: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo, be advised, you are falling behind!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOHASENTERED: ^2Prophet: ^7Alpha, be advised.  Bravo is on the X.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOSTANDBY: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo stand by.  Alpha confirm you have eyes on the prize.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOSTAYONHIM: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo your target is on the move.  Stay on him.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOTHEREISNOTI: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo--no time for window shopping.  Stay with your target.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOWELOSTCOM: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo, we've lost com with Alpha.  Working on a patch.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOYOUARELAGGI: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo, you are lagging--try to keep up.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOYOURENOT: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo, you're not moving.  What's your sit rep?
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOYOURETAKING: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo you've waited too long. KVA is alerted - abort!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOYOURTARGETI: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo, target is on the move.  Stay with him.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_BRAVOYOURWINDOW: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo, your window is closing.  Take the guard.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_COPYTHATBRAVOPRO: ^2Prophet: ^7Copy that, Bravo.  Alpha you are clear for Phase 2.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_COVERISBLOWN: ^2Prophet: ^7All stations, hard compromise! Abort!  Abort!  Abort!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_LOADINGUPPARTYBU: ^2Gideon: ^7Copy.  Alpha is loading up the truck.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_POSITIVEID: ^2Prophet: ^7Comm signal is a KVA match.  He's our Key-Man.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_WASPINPOSITION: ^2Prophet: ^7Alpha's truck is rolling to the gate.
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_PRP_WASPYOUVEBEENSPO: ^2Prophet: ^7WASP you've been spotted!  Abort the mission!  I repeat, abort the mission!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_SAN_MANDOWNSNIPERBEL: ^2Torres: ^7Man down!  Man down!  Sniper in the bell tower!
SUBTITLE_GREECE_GRK_SAN_WEHAVECONTACTYO: ^2Torres: ^7We have contact at the bell tower on--
